landing.title: Flexibits | Fantastical — The calendar and tasks app you won't be able to live without.
landing.text:
Flexibits | Fantastical — The calendar and tasks app you won't be able to live without.
Skip to main
Redeem
Try for Free
Fantastical
Cardhop
Pricing
Support
Blog
Try for Free
Sign In
Sign In
Try for Free
Give Your Calendar Superpowers
Unify all of your calendars – work and personal – into a single, beautifully organized view.
Say goodbye to double-bookings and missed updates.
Start for Free
Download Fantastical for Mac
or download from Flexibits
Watch the Video
Personal vs. Family vs. Work vs. Kids vs. Side Hustle vs. Interviews/meetings/bookings. Fantastical is the only app that does it all. ... I'd be lost without Fantastical ❤️.
If you're a small business owner with multiple calendars this is such a great way to consolidate them all in one place and be able to see your tasks at the top as well.
Fantastical ... gives me more flexibility to do what I want with my calendar instead of doing only what the calendar allowed me to do.
This one didn't disappoint – I can finally, truly, have my calendar provider of choice synchronized across all my devices.
I needed a solution to view a combination of work and personal calendars simultaneously to better manage my daily life, and suffice it to say this product helps my life run. Period.
The design is clean, the layout is intuitive, and adding events feels effortless. I love how I can just type “Meeting with Ray at 3pm tomorrow” and it knows exactly what I mean.
This app is one of the best apps I’ve ever downloaded on my iPhone. It is so simple to use.
Use it every day of my life ... and honestly couldn’t function without such a straightforward app love love love it
I have been using Fantastical since it came out and I have nothing but praise for it. I can see all my calendars in one place and can integrate apps like Todoist to see everything at a glance. Very happy with the app. Highly recommended.
Not only does Fantastical work great with Exchange, but it provides views and features that I didn’t even know I wanted. Calendar Sets is awesome. Integration is also great, and everything works wonderfully across iPad, iPhone, and macOS.
This is the best calendar app there is – PERIOD.
I love the ability to create a calendar set with my work calendars on it, but the ability to switch quickly back to my home calendars when I am away from work is very cool.
Its functionality to extract event information from the title is unmatched.
Outlook integration / Teams / Zoom are all really nice. Syncing works well across my Macs and iPhone.
The intuitive interface and thoughtful affordances make it so quick to manage a busy schedule.
See Everything.
Miss Nothing.
Fantastical connects to your existing calendars so you’ll be up and running in no time. Works with Google, Microsoft 365, Exchange, iCloud, Todoist, CalDAV, and more.
Desktop
Mac, Windows
Mobile
iPhone, iPad
Wearables
Apple Vision Pro, Apple Watch
All In Sync
with your Flexibits Account
Fantastical Premium unlocks awesome new features and supports continued development of the best calendar app.
— Zac Hall, 9to5Mac
(Fantastical is) ... the only calendar app I need, offering more power and flexibility than any alternative from Apple or the App Store.
— Federico Viticci, MacStories
The interface of the apps, as usual from Flexibits, is exquisite.
— John Gruber, Daring Fireball
Fantastical Premium is an app I can’t live without.
— Jim Dalrymple, The Loop
Fantastical is our pick for the best calendar app for iPhone and iPad, for Mac, and yes, even for Apple Watch.
— Staff, The Sweet Setup
You can throw all your other calendar apps in the trash.
— Lory Gil, iMore
Award-Winning Design
Packed with Features
Fantastical has an intuitive user interface with multiple views, including detailed (and beautiful) full screen views for iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Windows.
Effortless Event Creation
Use natural language or forward an email.
Add events or tasks in seconds by using natural language, like “Lunch with Sarah at 1pm tomorrow.” Alternatively, forward any event-related email to Fantastical and the built-in AI will extract the details and create an event for you.
File and Photo Attachments
Quickly access the files or photos you need at your next meeting or for your next task.
Quickly upload files or images directly from Fantastical to your iCloud, Google, or Exchange events. Attachments are accessible across all devices that sync with your calendar accounts.
Powerful Views
DayTicker. Day. Week. Month. Quarter. Year.
No matter what device you’re using, Fantastical will give you the view you want. See a quick overview of your calendar with the Fantastical DayTicker and Calendar views, and browse comprehensive full screen views of your day, week, month, quarter, or year when you need more (or less) detail.
Event & Task Templates
Quickly add your most frequently used events and tasks.
Fantastical can create quick templates from existing events and tasks. Selecting a template will copy all of the details from the template into a new event or task instantly. Scheduling frequent events has never been this simple.
Tasks
Plan. Schedule. Accomplish.
Design and complete your projects directly in Fantastical. Add tasks alongside calendar events and complete them when you've accomplished the task. Tasks notify you when they're due, and overdue tasks carry over to future dates. You'll never forget about a task again.
Also works with
Light & Dark
Some prefer dark. Some prefer light. Whatever style you like, it's your choice.
Fantastical
Light
Dark
Apple Vision Pro
See your events in a new dimension!
Stay on top of your schedule like never before. Keep an eye on events and tasks in a spatial environment. Get productive and step into the future of time management with Fantastical.
Fantastical Scheduling
Organizing calls and meetings
is now
easy
.
RSVP
New
Invite People
Invite others to your event with control over yes/no/maybe response types, number of participants, and registration deadlines.
Learn More
Openings
Request Time
Set up the times you are available and share a link with others. They pick a date and time, and you are all set! Openings will automatically block out slots based on your existing calendar events.
Learn More
Proposals
Easily Plan Events
Fantastical lets you see your invitees' availability and helps you find a time that works for everyone. Even better, you can send event proposals to your invitees with multiple times and dates.
Learn More
Conference Calls
Easily Add and Join Conference Calls
Fantastical Scheduling can automatically add a Google Meet, Zoom, Microsoft Teams, or Webex conference call to events others have scheduled with Openings. When creating your meeting template, just specify which conference call service you want to use and Fantastical will do the rest!
Quickly Join 30+ Conference Call Services
Fantastical’s automatic conference call link detection supports Zoom, Webex, Microsoft Teams, Google Meet, GoToMeeting, RingCentral Meetings, BlueJeans (Events), Whereby, Chime, Lifesize, VooV, BigBlueButton, HighFive, Vidyo, Circuit, StarLeaf, Lifesize, Blackboard, Lync, Around, Hopin, Vonage, Doxy, Jitsi Meet, TheraNest, SimplePractice, Dialpad Meetings (formerly UberConference), Gather, net2Phone Huddle, RiversideFM, Workplace Rooms, 3CX, MiTeam Meetings, PsychologyToday, and Granola.
Bringing Everyone Together
Families & Teams
Share your subscription with Flexibits Premium for Families or Teams. After you sign up, invite your family or team members to join and they will be able to use Flexibits Premium with their own private Flexibits Account.
Add My Family
For families up to 5.
Personal use only.
Add My Team
For small and large teams.
Commercial use.
Your Events
None of Our Business
Fantastical is designed with a privacy-first approach, which means it keeps as much private data on your device as possible. Your account’s password is stored securely on your device using the Keychain and never leaves your device. See our privacy policy for more details.
Privacy at Flexibits
Time Zones
Done Right
Stay on top of time zones with Fantastical's clear and handy time zone support.
Choose the time zones that are relevant to you and easily see the converted time on Fantastical's handy time zone card right in the event. Scheduling events in multiple time zones is now quick, easy, and helpful.
Fantastical
Widgets
14 widgets to mix-and-match your favorites directly on your home screen.
Quickly see your upcoming events, tasks, conference calls, weather, and more. Multiple small, medium, and large widgets help you stay organized even when you’re not using Fantastical directly.
Weather
See weather conditions for your days and weeks ahead.
Fantastical integrates a detailed 10-day weather forecast directly into all calendar views, with further details on demand. Powered by AccuWeather, Fantastical’s forecasts are accurate to the minute and RealFeel will inform you of what temperature conditions actually feel like once other factors (humidity, cloud cover, wind chill, etc.) have been taken into consideration.
Sunrise and sunset times are also displayed so you can plan your day perfectly. Plus, events with locations will display the weather details for that specific location on the location map.
Powered by
Interesting Calendars
Stay up to date with events that are important to you.
Browse, search, and instantly add new, up-to-date
          calendars for holidays of various countries, religions, or education systems. You can even add
          calendars for your favorite sports, TV shows, and much more... Get historical data and track your
          relevant upcoming events. It's relevant content for your calendar and it's never been this
          easy.
Deeply Integrated
Works With Your Ecosystem
Standby
Always by your side.
Lock your iPhone and turn it sideways while connected to power to have Fantastical display your choice of widgets: Icon, Date, Calendar, Up Next, or Event List.
Lock Screen Widgets
Always visible.
Quickly glance at your events directly on your Lock Screen with three widget options: Up Next, Calendar, and Quick Action.
International
Fantastical speaks your language.
Fantastical is fully localized in English, French, German, Italian, Spanish, European Portuguese, Brazilian Portuguese, and Japanese. Simply enter your event or reminder in any of those languages and Fantastical will automatically understand. It's magical.
Focus Filters
Focus on what matters.
With Fantastical’s Calendar Sets and Focus Filters you will only see the events and tasks that currently matter. Enable your Work calendars when you arrive at the office, or get reminders to call your kids when you get into the car.
Flexibits
Premium
Fantastical. Scheduling. Cardhop.
All your devices.
A single subscription unlocks all premium features in Fantastical and Cardhop across all your devices. Your calendars, tasks, and contacts will be more powerful,
      more productive, and more fun.
Events. Tasks. Meetings.
Learn More
People. Relationships. Actions.
Learn More
Start for Free
Download Fantastical for Mac
or download from Flexibits
Flexibits

$6.99
per user,                              per month
Try For Free
Everything from Individual and:
Single Sign-On support
Openings with multiple hosts
14 day free trial
Explore the Features
Fantastical
Cardhop
Essentials
The calendar you won't be able to live without.
Free
Premium
Add accounts
Add accounts
Add your existing calendar accounts like iCloud, Google, or Exchange directly to Fantastical and keep all of your events and tasks in sync.
Add events
Add events
Enter sentences such as "Lunch with John at 123 Main Street on Tuesday" and Fantastical instantly converts the sentence into an event and adds it to your calendar.
Add tasks
Add tasks
Enter sentences such as "todo Pick up dry cleaning on Friday" to create a task with a due date, ready to complete when the time is right.
Delete events and tasks
Delete events and tasks
A quick swipe or tap lets you clean up and manage your calendar.
Notifications
Notifications
Receive notifications of upcoming events and tasks.
Full screen day, week, month, quarter, and year
Full screen day, week, month, quarter, and year
Whatever device you’re using, Fantastical will let you see the view you want. See a quick overview of your calendar with the Fantastical DayTicker and Calendar views, and browse comprehensive full screen views of your day, week, month, quarter, or year when you need more detail.
Full task support, including iCloud Reminders and Todoist
Full task support, including iCloud Reminders and Todoist
With a focused Tasks view, Fantastical now supports iCloud Reminders, Todoist, and Google Tasks. Users can see their events and dated tasks together in the main list. Tasks can be quickly created by starting sentences with "tasks", "todo", "reminder", or "remind me to." Users can also add dates, times, and location-based geofences (when I arrive/when I leave) to their tasks.
Show event location details
Show event location details
Fantastical shows a map preview of events that have a location. Open locations directly in Apple Maps, Google Maps, Waze, or other popular navigation apps.
Multiple platforms
Multiple platforms
Fantastical is available for Mac, iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch, Apple Vision Pro, and Windows.
Forward emails to Fantastical
Forward emails to Fantastical
Fantastical can automatically detect events in emails you forward to Fantastical. Just forward an email to email@fantastical.app and it will be available to add to your calendar.
Attachments on iOS
Attachments on iOS
Add your accounts directly to Fantastical on iOS to create and view attachments for your events. Fantastical automatically downloads attachments for your upcoming events, including attachments that are received as part of an invitation.
Push sync
Push sync
Fantastical syncs your events and tasks across all your devices in real-time. Make changes on one device and see them instantly on all your other devices.
Calendar mirroring
Calendar mirroring
Mirror events from one calendar to another, keeping your schedule in sync across multiple calendars.
2 Weeks
6 Months
Weather forecast
Weather forecast
Fantastical brings advanced AccuWeather forecasts directly into your calendar. You can also see the expected temperature in the details of your upcoming events based on the event location. AccuWeather’s MinuteCast® shows a minute-by-minute forecast of when it will start or stop raining or snowing. The MinuteCast® also integrates with Fantastical’s time to leave notifications, so you’ll never forget to take your umbrella with you.
3 Days
10 Days
Email support
Email support
Priority email support means you’ll be one of the first to receive a reply from our support team. We value your support and want to make sure we make you happy too.
Standard
Priority
Single Sign-On (SSO)
Single Sign-On (SSO)
Streamline your team members' credentials by connecting Google Workspace as well as other OIDC or SAML providers. You may optionally require your team members to always use SSO to sign in.
Teams
Productivity
All the extras.
Free
Premium
Calendar sets
Calendar sets
Calendar sets are a Fantastical innovation to quickly manage calendars and task lists like never before. Calendar sets consist of visible and hidden calendars, which lets users quickly toggle multiple calendars and task lists on and off with a click or a keystroke. Even better, location-based calendar sets will automatically switch to a specific calendar set when the user arrives or leaves a specified location.
1 Set
Unlimited
Calendar sets syncing
Calendar sets syncing
One of our most requested features is now here: the ability to sync calendar sets to all devices, even on Apple Watch!
Automatic calendar set switching (by time or by location)
Automatic calendar set switching (by time or by location)
You can automatically have a calendar set activate based on your location or at a specific time.
Travel time
Travel time
Fantastical can block out travel time to events in your calendar, giving you a clear indication of when you will be in transit to aid with future scheduling. (Coming soon to Windows.)
Live Activities (Mac, iOS, iPadOS, and watchOS only)
Live Activities (Mac, iOS, iPadOS, and watchOS only)
Keep track of your next event on your lock screen and in the Dynamic Island. Fantastical’s Live Activities show the time remaining until your next event along with its title and location.
Time to leave notifications
Time to leave notifications
Fantastical will send you a notification when you need to leave to make it to an event on time. Time to leave notifications take traffic conditions and your current location into account, and also include the AccuWeather MinuteCast® so you know whether to expect rain or snow. (Coming soon to Windows.)
Urgent alarms (iOS and iPadOS only)
Urgent alarms (iOS and iPadOS only)
Some things are too important to be ignored. Set urgent alarms for events and tasks on your iPhone and iPad.
Interesting calendars
Interesting calendars
Fantastical includes a comprehensive collection of calendars for holidays, sports, TV, and much more. Add these calendars to Fantastical with one tap or click to stay on top of what’s happening. Powered by SchedJoules, Fantastical’s interesting calendars make it easier than ever to add events relevant to you.
Apple Watch support
Apple Watch support
Fantastical syncs to your Apple Watch, even when you’re away from your phone (requires Apple Watch with cell plan). View your upcoming events and tasks with a variety of complication options and quickly see what you have coming up next in the Apple Watch app.
Home screen widgets
Home screen widgets
Quickly see your upcoming events, tasks, conference calls, weather, and more. Multiple small, medium, and large widgets help you stay organized even when you’re not using Fantastical directly.
Scheduling
Organizing calls and meetings is now easy.
Free
Premium
RSVP: Invite people with registration and deadlines
RSVP: Invite people with registration and deadlines
Fantastical makes it easy to invite others to your event with control over yes/no/maybe response types, number of participants, and registration deadlines.
Openings: Schedule events based on your availability
Openings: Schedule events based on your availability
Fantastical makes it easy for people to schedule meetings with you. Set up the times you are available and share your Fantastical link. They pick a date and time, and you are all set! Fantastical Openings will automatically block out meeting slots based on your existing calendar events.
Openings: Multiple hosts
Openings: Multiple hosts
Availability of multiple team members can be combined in Fantastical Openings to offer time slots that work for everyone.
Teams
Proposals: Create meeting polls
Proposals: Create meeting polls
Fantastical makes it easy to create meeting proposals so people can choose what dates or times work for them. Create a proposal and the invitees will be asked to choose what times work for them. Once everyone responds and a common time is found, the proposal can automatically be turned into an event and added to your calendar. No more back and forth emails, texts, or calls!
Webhooks and Zapier integration
Webhooks and Zapier integration
Fantastical Scheduling offers webhooks and Zapier integration so that you can create workflows to automate tasks and make Openings, Proposals, and RSVPs even more powerful.
Collaboration
Plays nice with others.
Free
Premium
Invitees
Invitees
Fantastical integrates with iCloud, Google, and Exchange invitees so that you can send and receive event invitations. If you use Google Calendar, Exchange, or a supported CalDAV service you can also view when other people are available and easily find times that work for everyone.
1 Per Event
Unlimited
Google Meet, Zoom, Webex, and Microsoft Teams support
Google Meet, Zoom, Webex, and Microsoft Teams support
Choose whether or not to create a Google Meet conference with new events. Add your Zoom, Webex, or Microsoft account so that Fantastical can attach conferences directly to your events.
Automatic conference call link detection
Automatic conference call link detection
Fantastical’s automatic conference call link detection supports Zoom, Webex, Microsoft Teams, Google Meet, GoToMeeting, RingCentral Meetings, BlueJeans (Events), Whereby, Chime, Lifesize, VooV, BigBlueButton, HighFive, Vidyo, Circuit, StarLeaf, Lifesize, Blackboard, Lync, Around, Hopin, Vonage, Doxy, Jitsi Meet, TheraNest, SimplePractice, Dialpad Meetings (formerly UberConference), Gather, net2Phone Huddle, RiversideFM, Workplace Rooms, 3CX, MiTeam Meetings, PsychologyToday, and Granola.
Single-click Join button and menu bar item
Single-click Join button and menu bar item
All upcoming events with a conference call will automatically show a badge in the list, Day, and Week views. Best of all, events with a conference call will show a Join button in the list plus the Day and Week views so you can quickly join your conference call with a single click or tap when the call is about to begin. The macOS version also has a Join icon in the menu bar.
Meet With: View when others are available
Meet With: View when others are available
Quickly check the schedules of other people in your organization, making it easier to decide when to meet with others.
1 Person
Unlimited
Combine duplicate events
Combine duplicate events
Ever get tired of seeing duplicate events from calendars that have similar info? Duplicate events can be automatically combined and let you only see one.
Hide events
Hide events
Hide events or tasks on shared calendars that are cluttering up your schedule.
Favorite time zones
Favorite time zones
Choose the time zones that are relevant to you and easily see the exact time any event in your calendar occurs. Scheduling events in multiple time zones is now quick, easy, and straightforward.
Customization
Whatever style you like, it's your choice.
Free
Premium
Templates for events and tasks
Templates for events and tasks
Quickly create similar events and tasks. Fantastical can create quick templates from existing events or tasks so you can easily reuse them. Selecting a template will instantly copy all of the details from the template into a new event or task. Scheduling frequent events has never been this simple.
Custom event colors
Custom event colors
Even if your calendar is one color, you can change your events to be another. Color coding makes it easy to find specific events or prioritize them.
Emoji badges
Emoji badges
Categorize your day at a glance by adding emoji badges to your events. Badges are not shared, so you can use them on read-only events or meeting invitations and only you will see them.
Custom home screen and dock icons
Custom home screen and dock icons
Choose from a variety of icons to make Fantastical your own on your home screen or dock.
Custom notification sounds (iOS, iPadOS, and visionOS only)
Custom notification sounds (iOS, iPadOS, and visionOS only)
Choose from 19 custom alert sounds to customize your notifications settings like event alerts, task alerts, birthday alerts, and more.
Essentials
The contacts app you'll actually want to use.
Free
Premium
Add contacts
Add cont

hits.title: Using GANs to Create Fantastical Creatures
The Phlogiston Theory – Wonderfully wrong but fantastically fruitful
Fantastical: A new calendar app for Mac launches
Fantastically Wrong: The Legendary Scientist Who Swore Our Planet Is Hollow
The Fantastically Strange Origin of Most Coal on Earth (2016)

analysis.name: Fantastical
analysis.value_proposition: A beautifully designed calendar and tasks app that unifies work and personal calendars into a single view with natural-language event creation and cross-device sync.
analysis.ideal_customer: Apple-ecosystem individuals, families, and small teams who juggle multiple calendar accounts and want a polished, natural-language calendar with scheduling and tasks

features.name: natural language event creation
features.description: Type sentences like 'Lunch with Sarah at 1pm tomorrow' and Fantastical parses them into events.
features.evidence_quote: Enter sentences such as "Lunch with John at 123 Main Street on Tuesday" and Fantastical instantly converts

features.name: email forwarding to calendar
features.description: Forward event-related emails to email@fantastical.app and AI extracts details to create events.
features.evidence_quote: Just forward an email to email@fantastical.app and it will be available to add to your calendar.

features.name: ai event extraction
features.description: Built-in AI extracts event details from forwarded emails.
features.evidence_quote: forward any event-related email to Fantastical and the built-in AI will extract the details

features.name: unified calendar view
features.description: Combine work, personal, and other calendars in a single view.
features.evidence_quote: Unify all of your calendars – work and personal – into a single, beautifully organized view.

features.name: google calendar sync
features.description: Connects to Google Calendar accounts.
features.evidence_quote: Works with Google, Microsoft 365, Exchange, iCloud, Todoist, CalDAV, and more.

features.name: microsoft 365 sync
features.description: Connects to Microsoft 365 / Outlook calendars.
features.evidence_quote: Works with Google, Microsoft 365, Exchange, iCloud, Todoist, CalDAV, and more.

features.name: exchange sync
features.description: Connects to Microsoft Exchange calendars.
features.evidence_quote: Works with Google, Microsoft 365, Exchange, iCloud, Todoist, CalDAV, and more.

features.name: icloud sync
features.description: Connects to iCloud calendars.
features.evidence_quote: Works with Google, Microsoft 365, Exchange, iCloud, Todoist, CalDAV, and more.

features.name: caldav support
features.description: Supports generic CalDAV calendar servers.
features.evidence_quote: Works with Google, Microsoft 365, Exchange, iCloud, Todoist, CalDAV, and more.

differentiators: Award-winning native design across Mac, iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch, Apple Vision Pro, and Windows
Calendar Sets — quickly switch between grouped calendar contexts (work vs. home)
Apple Vision Pro spatial calendar experience
AccuWeather MinuteCast + time-to-leave integration inside the calendar
Fantastical Scheduling (Openings + RSVP) bundled with the calendar app instead of a separate Calendly-style purchase

recent_ships.what: RSVP for Scheduling — invite people with yes/no/maybe controls, participant caps, and registration deadlines

praised: "This is the best calendar app there is – PERIOD."
"Its functionality to extract event information from the title is unmatched."
"I love how I can just type 'Meeting with Ray at 3pm tomorrow' and it knows exactly what I mean."
"Calendar Sets is awesome. Integration is also great, and everything works wonderfully across iPad, iPhone, and macOS."
"Outlook integration / Teams / Zoom are all really nice. Syncing works well across my Macs and iPhone."
Pick for best calendar app on iPhone/iPad/Mac/Apple Watch (The Sweet Setup)

free_tier.limits: basic calendar + Cardhop only; no Premium features (no natural-language power features, no Scheduling, no calendar sets, no MinuteCast, no priority support)

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Fantastical & Cardhop, simple calendar, works with existing calendars

tiers.name: Individual
tiers.headline_inclusions: All Premium features, Fantastical Scheduling, Priority Support ($4.75/mo billed annually)

tiers.name: Family
tiers.headline_inclusions: Individual features shared with up to 5 members ($7.50/mo billed annually)

tiers.name: Team
tiers.headline_inclusions: Individual + SSO + Openings with multiple hosts ($4.75/user/mo billed annually)

pricing.notes: Annual billing gets ~32% off ($4.75 vs $6.99). Family capped at 5 members. Team plan is the highest tier and includes SSO (SAML/OIDC/Google Workspace); no separate enterprise/contact-sales tier is offered. All paid tiers include a 14-day free trial.
